# Terminull ‚Äî plugin contract (llms.txt)

> Terminull is one panel for every CLI coding agent. It is extended by PLUGINS,
> never by patching core. This page is the whole plugin contract in one screen;
> the exhaustive reference (full JSON-schema, error codes, per-point examples) is
> `docs/plugin-authoring/SKILL.md` (Claude) and `docs/plugin-authoring/AGENTS.md`
> (codex/gemini).

## The one rule

NEVER modify Terminull core. Extend ONLY through the eight declarative
contribution points. After every edit run `terminull plugins validate <dir>` and
loop until it is green ‚Äî it is the machine oracle. A plugin cannot reach outside
its own directory (module jail) and is disabled with a reason if it is
incompatible or malformed.

## What a plugin is

An npm package `terminull-plugin-*` with a declarative manifest
(`terminull.plugin.json`, or a `terminull` field in `package.json`, or
`package.json` itself) plus lazily-loaded module files. First-party features use
the same mechanism (dogfooding).

## Manifest shape

```json
{
  "name": "terminull-plugin-<slug>",
  "version": "0.1.0",
  "pluginApi": "^1",
  "displayName": { "en": "‚Ä¶", "ko": "‚Ä¶" },
  "contributes": { "<point>": [ { "id": "‚Ä¶", "module": "./‚Ä¶", "‚Ä¶": "‚Ä¶" } ] }
}
```

- Every label is `LocalizedText` ‚Äî `en` and `ko` are BOTH required.
- Objects are strict: unknown keys are rejected.

## The eight contribution points

| Point | Label field | Required extra | Optional |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| adapters | displayName | ‚Äî | ‚Äî (module default-exports a zero-arg ToolAdapter factory) |
| renderers | displayName | ‚Äî | mimeTypes[] |
| panels | title | ‚Äî | location: sidebar\|main\|statusbar |
| themes | label | kind: light\|dark | ‚Äî |
| locales | label | locale (BCP-47) | ‚Äî |
| keymaps | label | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| harnessForms | title | ‚Äî | targets[] |
| commands | title | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |

First-class scaffold templates: theme, panel, locale. The other five share a
generic template. `terminull plugins scaffold <point> <name>` writes a package
that already validates.

## Semver gate

Host API major = 1. `pluginApi` must admit it: `^1`, `1`, `1.0.0`, or comparators
like `>=1 <2`. `^2` / `banana` / `""` fail closed. Use `^1`.

## Validate ‚Üí the loop

1. `terminull plugins scaffold <point> <name>`
2. edit manifest + module
3. `terminull plugins validate <dir>`  (`--json` for machines)
4. not green? fix by each issue's `code` + `at`, GOTO 3

Programmatic: `import { validatePluginDir } from '@terminull/plugin-api/validate'`
and `import { scaffoldPlugin } from '@terminull/plugin-api/scaffold'` (Node-only).
Pure schemas + the `rangeSatisfies` gate: `@terminull/plugin-api`.

## Working examples

- examples/terminull-plugin-obsidian-warm ‚Äî theme (token overrides)
- examples/terminull-plugin-scratchpad ‚Äî panel (test loads via the real PluginHost)
- examples/terminull-plugin-locale-ja ‚Äî a full Japanese locale pack (core ships ko+en)
- examples/terminull-plugin-broken ‚Äî intentionally invalid (shows an actionable FAIL)

## Reference

- docs/plugin-authoring/SKILL.md ‚Äî full schema, error codes, per-point examples (Claude)
- docs/plugin-authoring/AGENTS.md ‚Äî same, for codex/gemini
